summary: Iteration 15: Visual Ad Template Editor fully tested and working. Backend 14/14 tests passed. Frontend all features verified: Visual Editor dialog, Quick Scam Templates, Live Preview, Design/Content/Style tabs, Color Presets, Save/Edit templates.

minor.issue: Color picker uses shorthand '#fff' instead of full '#ffffff' format
minor.details: Console warning: The specified value '#fff' does not conform to the required format. The format is '#rrggbb' where rr, gg, bb are two-digit hexadecimal numbers.

visual_editor_button.details: Visual Editor button opens editor dialog from Templates tab

quick_scam_templates.details: All 5 scam templates auto-fill correctly: Prize/Giveaway, Fake Virus Alert, Fake Software Update, Get Rich Quick, Fake Tech Support. Toast notification shows 'Applied X template'

live_preview.details: Live Preview updates in real-time when template properties change. Shows headline, description, CTA button, urgency banner, and styling

style_tab_colors.details: Style tab shows: Background Color, Text Color, Button Color, Button Text Color pickers with hex inputs. Font Size and Border Radius sliders work correctly

color_presets.details: 6 color presets work: Danger Red, Warning Orange, Corporate Blue, Money Green, Tech Purple, Dark Mode

save_template.details: Save Template creates new template in database. Template appears in list immediately. Toast shows 'Template created successfully'

edit_template.details: Edit button on template cards opens Visual Editor with existing template data pre-filled. Update Template saves changes

ad_type_selection.details: 4 ad types work correctly: Banner Ad, Popup Ad, Sidebar Ad, Native Ad. Each has distinct icon and preview layout

design_content_style_tabs.details: All 3 tabs accessible: Design (name, type, quick templates), Content (headline, description, CTA, image, urgency), Style (colors, fonts, presets)

action_items: Minor: Convert shorthand color values (#fff) to full format (#ffffff) in SCAM_TEMPLATES to avoid console warnings
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_E2E_Visual_Editor template during testing (cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Visual Ad Template Editor fully functional. All features work: 1) Visual Editor button in Templates tab opens editor dialog, 2) Quick Scam Templates auto-fill form with predefined content and colors, 3) Live Preview updates in real-time, 4) Style tab has color pickers (bg, text, button, button text), font size and border radius sliders, 5) Color presets apply correct colors (Danger Red, Warning Orange, Corporate Blue, Money Green, Tech Purple, Dark Mode), 6) Save/Edit templates work correctly with toast notifications, 7) Ad Type selection (Banner, Popup, Sidebar, Native) changes preview layout, 8) Edit button loads existing template data for modification
